title: Tice £91,000 tax row is 'minor administrative error', party claims
summary: A property company owned by Reform UK's deputy leader failed to pay £91,000 in tax on dividends, with the party claiming it was a minor administrative error. The incident raises questions about financial oversight in the party's operations.
content: A property company owned by the Reform UK deputy leader failed to pay £91,000 in tax on dividends, according to the Sunday Times.

zh.title: 蒂斯9.1万英镑税务纠纷被指为"轻微行政错误"
zh.summary: 改革英国副领导人旗下的房产公司未能支付9.1万英镑的股息税，该党声称这是一个轻微的行政错误。这一事件引发了人们对该党财务监督的质疑。

title: ‘The Super Mario Galaxy Movie’ rockets to $629 million worldwide at the box office
summary: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie has reached $629 million at the worldwide box office, providing strong momentum heading into the May summer movie season. The film's success indicates continued consumer appetite for video game adaptations.
content: "The Super Mario Galaxy Movie" is helping to power up box-office momentum before the summer movie season begins in May.

zh.title: 《超级马里奥银河电影》全球票房飙升至6.29亿美元
zh.summary: 《超级马里奥银河电影》全球票房达到6.29亿美元，为五月夏季电影季节提供了强劲动力。这部电影的成功表明消费者对电子游戏改编电影的持续需求。

title: April’s stock-market rebound is about to face its first major test as earnings season swings into gear
summary: The U.S. stock market's April recovery faces its first major test as first-quarter earnings season begins. Companies' reported results will determine whether the recent market gains can sustain momentum.
content: The recovery in the U.S. stock market since the beginning of April could soon face its first critical test, as the first-quarter corporate earnings season is about to get underway.

zh.title: 四月股市反弹将迎来财报季首次重大考验
zh.summary: 美国股市4月份的反弹在第一季度财报季开始时面临首次重大考验。公司报告的业绩将决定最近的市场涨幅是否能维持势头。

title: Trump says U.S. will blockade Strait of Hormuz after Iran peace talks fail
summary: Former President Trump proposed a U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz following failed Iran peace talks, aiming to prevent Iran from controlling the strategic waterway. The move could have significant implications for global energy markets and geopolitics.
content: Trump said the U.S. blockade will stop Iran from policing the strait and benefiting economically while the rest of the world suffers from its closure.

zh.title: 特朗普称美国将在伊朗和平谈判失败后封锁霍尔木兹海峡
zh.summary: 前总统特朗普在伊朗和平谈判失败后提议美国封锁霍尔木兹海峡，旨在防止伊朗控制这条战略性水道。此举可能对全球能源市场和地缘政治产生重大影响。

title: Here are the 3 big things we're watching in the stock market this week
summary: As earnings season begins, investors are monitoring three key stock market drivers while maintaining focus on the Middle East conflict. Economic data and geopolitical developments will shape market direction this week.
content: Earnings season kicks off as investors remain focused on Middle East conflict.

zh.title: 以下是我们本周关注的股票市场三大事件
zh.summary: 随着财报季开始，投资者正在监测三个关键股市驱动因素，同时关注中东冲突。经济数据和地缘政治发展将塑造本周的市场方向。

title: Many Gen Z adults still get financial help from their parents
summary: Many Gen Z adults continue to receive financial support from their parents as they pursue independence. Financial advisors emphasize treating parental aid as a strategic plan rather than a permanent lifestyle arrangement.
content: Financial support from your parents can help you to become independent. But that means treating the money "as a plan, not a lifestyle," one advisor said.

zh.title: 许多Z世代成年人仍然从父母那里获得财务帮助
zh.summary: 许多Z世代成年人在追求独立的过程中继续从父母那里获得财务支持。财务顾问强调应将父母的帮助视为战略计划，而不是永久的生活方式安排。

title: How Beyond Meat sank from a $14 billion plant-based protein powerhouse to a penny stock
summary: Beyond Meat has collapsed from a $14 billion valuation to penny stock status, driven by factors beyond mere sales declines and losses. The company's dramatic fall illustrates challenges in the plant-based protein market.
content: There’s a lot more to Beyond Meat’s fall from grace than just falling sales and mounting losses.

zh.title: Beyond Meat如何从140亿美元的植物蛋白龙头跌至便士股
zh.summary: Beyond Meat从140亿美元的估值崩盘至便士股票，原因远超过销售下滑和亏损。该公司的剧烈下跌说明了植物蛋白市场面临的挑战。

title: This morning routine is key to a successful day, says mental performance coach—and it only takes 4 minutes
summary: Mental performance coach Cindra Kamphoff recommends a 4-minute morning routine focused on gratitude and purpose as the foundation for a successful day. The simple practice can set a positive tone for productivity and well-being.
content: Start the day strong by focusing on gratitude and purpose, says mental performance coach Cindra Kamphoff.

zh.title: 心理表现教练说这个早晨习惯是成功一天的关键——只需4分钟
zh.summary: 心理表现教练Cindra Kamphoff推荐一个4分钟的早晨习惯，专注于感恩和目标，作为成功一天的基础。这个简单的做法可以为生产力和幸福感奠定积极的基调。

title: Couples who are 'emotionally secure' regularly talk about 8 things, says Harvard-trained psychologist
summary: Harvard-trained psychologist Dr. Cortney Warren identifies eight conversation topics that emotionally secure couples regularly discuss. These discussions are key to building trust and maintaining happy, successful relationships.
content: Building a trusting relationship is the goal for most couples. Harvard-trained psychologist Dr. Cortney Warren shares eight things emotionally secure couples talk about to have a happy and successful relationship.

zh.title: 哈佛培训的心理学家说"情感安全"的伴侣定期讨论8个话题
zh.summary: 哈佛培训的心理学家Cortney Warren博士指出，情感安全的伴侣定期讨论的8个话题。这些讨论是建立信任和维持幸福、成功关系的关键。

title: Top Wall Street analysts prefer these dividend stocks for steady income
summary: Wall Street analysts recommend dividend stocks as a portfolio stabilizer during uncertain economic times, offering steady income streams for investors seeking stability.
content: Given ongoing uncertainty, investors may seek to add some stability to their portfolios by buying dividend stocks for steady income.

zh.title: 顶级华尔街分析师青睐这些股息股票以获得稳定收入
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师建议将股息股票作为投资组合稳定器，在经济不确定时期为寻求稳定的投资者提供稳定的收入流。

title: Morgan Stanley predicts these beaten-down Chinese stocks can rebound on easing Middle East tensions
summary: Morgan Stanley identifies Chinese stocks with significant Middle East revenue exposure as potential rebound opportunities if regional tensions ease.
content: The strategists looked at Chinese companies with significant revenue exposure to the region.

zh.title: 摩根士丹利预测随着中东紧张局势缓解，这些被低估的中国股票可能反弹
zh.summary: 摩根士丹利指出，拥有重大中东收入敞口的中国股票可能是区域紧张局势缓解时的反弹机会。

title: Earnings playbook: JPMorgan Chase and Netflix kick off the reporting season
summary: The earnings season accelerates this week as JPMorgan Chase and Netflix report results, with investors eager for corporate guidance amid economic uncertainty.
content: The earnings season kicks into high gear this week, at a time when investors may be starving for corporate guidance.

zh.title: 财报季手册：摩根大通和Netflix启动财报季
zh.summary: 本周随着摩根大通和Netflix发布业绩，财报季加速，投资者期待在经济不确定情况下获得企业指引。

title: Vance leaves Pakistan talks with no deal. How financial markets are reacting.
summary: U.S.-Iran negotiations in Pakistan concluded without agreement, triggering declines in stock futures and increases in oil prices across financial markets.
content: As U.S.-Iran talks in Pakistan ended without a deal, U.S. stock futures were sliding and oil was climbing, based on trading via a crypto-based trading platform.

zh.title: 万斯离开巴基斯坦谈判，未达成协议。金融市场如何反应
zh.summary: 美国-伊朗在巴基斯坦的谈判未达成协议，导致股指期货下跌和油价上升，对金融市场造成影响。

title: Hungarians vote in landmark election closely watched by EU, Russia, U.S.
summary: Hungary holds a pivotal election attracting international scrutiny as Prime Minister Orban's 'illiberal democracy' model influences populist movements worldwide.
content: Prime Minister Viktor Orban has carved ‌out a model of an "illiberal democracy" seen as a blueprint by populist movements.

zh.title: 匈牙利举行具有里程碑意义的选举，受欧盟、俄罗斯、美国密切关注
zh.summary: 匈牙利举行关键性选举，吸引国际关注，总理欧尔班的"非自由民主制"模式对全球民粹主义运动产生影响。

title: British Steel 'needs nationalising by the summer'
summary: A Labour MP argues British Steel should be nationalized by summer as the company's ownership situation remains uncertain amid ongoing negotiations.
content: Labour MP Nic Dakin says it is "the best outcome" for British Steel as ownership talks continue.

zh.title: 英国钢铁公司"需要在夏季前收归国有"
zh.summary: 一位工党议员主张英国钢铁公司应在夏季前收归国有，因为该公司的所有权状况在正在进行的谈判中仍不确定。
